chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 385 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of post-arrest bail 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of post-arrest bail 12.08.2025 Mr. Deedar Ali Chohan, Advocate for the applicant. Mr. Muhammad Raza Katohar, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for the applicant requires the bail application to be disposed of as not pressed, as according to him, the applicant has since expired in confinement. The bail application stands disposed of as not pressed accordingly. J U D G E Abdul Basit
